title: No Dimension Background
description: Mod that removes portal background from dimension transition screen.
body:
Mod allows to remove animated portal background that added in 1.20.5 while you teleporting between dimensions. This mod requires only Fabric Loader and can be configured with config file, but Mod Menu and Cloth Config API are recommended.

Versions support:
| Minecraft Version | Mod Version |
|-------------------|-------------|
| 1.20.5–1.21.1     | 1.2.0-1     |
| 1.21.2–1.21.5     | 1.2.3-1     |
| 1.21.6–1.21.8     | 1.3.0       |
| 1.21.9-1.21.10    | 1.4.0       |
| 1.21.11           | 1.5.0       |
